name: ExtensionRegulatedAuthorization_Basis
title: R5: The legal/regulatory framework or reasons under which this authorization is granted (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `RegulatedAuthorization.basis` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`RegulatedAuthorization.basis` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `RegulatedAuthorization.basis` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.basis` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RegulatedAuthorization` is not mapped.
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.basis` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: The legal/regulatory framework or reasons under which this authorization is granted
element.definition: The legal or regulatory framework against which this authorization is granted, or other reasons for it.

binding.description: A legal or regulatory framework against which an authorization is granted, or other reasons for it.
